package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_defer_for_simple_unlock_in_hot_loop: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag defer used for simple unlock/close work inside very hot loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule545PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario545Positive(records []Rule545PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
